Video.summary: Watch as the greatest Monster Jam superstars race into action at the Alamodome in San Antonio, TX, on January 12, 2008.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson brings the Arena Championship Series East points lead to the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee. El Toro Loco’s Armando Castro looks to drive El Toro Loco to another Overall Event Championship while 2019 World Finals Champion Linsey Read tries to defeat them both.
Video.title: Fiserv Forum - Milwaukee, WI

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series West heats up the Arizona desert as Earth Shaker’s Tristan England gets one step closer to winning the series. Meanwhile, El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez isn’t ready to just give the series championship to England and looks to shrink the points gap. It’s a race to the finish to see who will earn the automatic bid to Monster Jam World Finals XXII in Nashville.
Video.title: Tucson Arena - Tucson, AZ

Video.summary: SoFi Stadium hosts it’s first ever Monster Jam event as Stadium Championship Series Blue heads to Inglewood, California. Can Megalodon’s Cory Rummell continue his winning ways or will Tyler Menninga clinch his first stadium series title.
Video.title: SoFi Stadium - Inglewood, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam is hot with excitement and the freestyle action from the Georgia Dome, on January 10, 2004.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss all the freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium on January 17, 2014.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the Monster Jam racing action from the HHH Metrodome, on December 1, 2012.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 5 of the Stadium Championship Series, in The Dome at America's Center in St. Louis, MO.
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Superstar Sting joins Monster Jam for a wild night at the Metrodome in Minneapolis, MN during Monster Jam's 2001 season!
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Check out all your favorite trucks and drivers competing in all racing and freestyle action from the Louisiana Superdome, on January 30, 2010.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: A huge field of some of the world's greatest freestyling monster trucks battle for a shot at victory at Alltel Stadium.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: In the Stadium Championship Series Red finale, Series Champion, Adam Anderson looks to finish strong and lead Grave Digger to his 10th event win of the season. Tom Meents, Bryce Kenny, Kayla Blood, and Todd LeDuc battle it out to finish in the Top-5 of the Red Series.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: All of your favorite trucks and drivers race into Angel Stadium of Anaheim on January 10, 2009.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss Monster Jam freestyle action at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Racing, field goals, the two-wheel competition, and a whole lot of action at Lincoln Financial Field.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the HHH Metrodome, on December 5, 2009 with more racing fun from your favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss the racing and freestyle action from Qualcomm Stadium, on January 23, 2010.
Video.title: Qualcomm Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: A sold-out crowd packs out the famous Citrus Bowl to watch the biggest names in Monster Jam racing action from Orlando, FL, on January 27, 2007.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2007 season finishes up with all the racing action from Monster Jam World Finals 8 on March 24, 2007.
Video.title: World Finals VIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals VIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals VIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals VIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Buckle in for more freestyle fun from Monster Jam World Finals 12 on March 26, 2011.
Video.title: World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2/2

Image.alt: World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2/2
World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2/2
World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2/2

Video.summary: A continuation of the first Monster Jam World Finals sees even more exciting racing and freestyle action!
Video.title: World Finals 1 - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Part 2

Image.alt: World Finals 1 - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Part 2
World Finals 1 - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Part 2
World Finals 1 - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Part 2

Video.summary: Watch this 2019 Monster Jam Rewind of the World Finals Freestyle from Orlando, FL!
Video.title: World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle
World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle
World Finals XX- Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Catch all the racing action during the Monster Jam World Finals XIII, on March 24, 2012.
Video.title: World Finals XIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals XIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals XIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals XIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Catch all of the non-stop action in this epic-sized compilation of 2024's best freestyle runs!
Video.title: Best of Freestyle Runs - 2024

Video.summary: We’ve gathered the most jaw-dropping highlights featuring the Marvel-themed monster trucks. Featuring The Amazing Spider-Man, Thor, Iron Man, and Black Panther. AND - Genius, billionaire, playboy, monster truck. Suit up for this action packed compilation of Marvel's Iron Man as we highlight the best freestyles of driver Brandon Arthur and this hero on four wheels!
Video.title: Best of Marvel Monster Trucks

Video.summary: Monster Jam Fast Track ignites the night at loneDepot Park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 7 of the Stadium Championship Series East. As the road to the World Finals in Salt Lake City narrows, every point becomes a battleground for the elite drivers of the "Good Vibes Tour". Experience the tactical intensity of JCB Racing, where Cynthia Gauthier looks to settle scores in a first-time seasonal matchup against Megalodon, and the technical mastery of the Skills Challenge, featuring gravity-defying moonwalks and precision donuts. The evening culminates in a chaotic Freestyle segment, where 12,000-pound machines like Mayhem and Sparkle Smash are pushed to their absolute limits, facing mechanical failures and spectacular "big air" moments in pursuit of the Miami crown.
Video.title: loanDepot Park - Miami, FL 1

Video.summary: The dirt flies in Des Moines as the Arena Championship Series West brings high-stakes competition to the Casey's Center. The action reaches a fever pitch during the Great Clips Skills Challenge and a high-flying Freestyle segment featuring a gravity-defying backflip by Armando Castro in El Toro Loco. Witness a season-defining performance as the field battles for an automatic bid to the Monster Jam World Finals in Salt Lake City.
Video.title: Casey's Center - Des Moines, IA

Video.summary: The 2012 season of Monster Jam continues on at the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL
